label: day
groundingNote: a time of one kind; when it is this time in a place, people in this place can see the {urn:molecule-v0:sun|sun} [m] above them, people can see many things, people do many things; after this time, for some time people cannot see it; after this, this time happens one more time
notes: Single biggest molecule-gated lemma in TinyStories (2.06%% of top-500 content mass). Day/night cycle vocabulary per m0b.
